name: Niki Parmar
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Worked on image generation models at Google Brain
Co-founded Essential AI with Ashish Vaswani after leaving Google
summary: Niki Parmar is a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017), the paper that introduced the Transformer architecture. At Google Brain, she contributed to research on image generation and attention-based models. After Google, she co-founded Essential AI with fellow Transformer co-author Ashish Vaswani to build enterprise AI products.
